description: A device for giving light; a source of illumination. 'Luma' names what brings light—the steady glow that extends day into darkness.
sound_symbolism: The word glows steady. 'Lu' shines with warm light, illumination spreading. Then 'ma' grounds with stable presence, lamp reliable.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'luma' (the lamp). General term for light sources. Related to 'philu' (candle) and 'lumoi' (lantern).

pillars.solarpunk-values: Light enabling life—sustainable illumination extending productive hours, knowledge shared after dark.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Lamp as metaphor—inner light of awareness illuminating confusion, wisdom dispelling ignorance.
